name: subtitle-translate
description: Browser-first subtitle translation package with Ollama adapter and Node CLI

scripts.quick-test: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js fixtures/sample.en.srt --to vi --out fixtures/sample.vi.srt --model qwen3.5:9b --base-url http://127.0.0.1:11434
scripts.quick-test:stdout: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js fixtures/sample.en.srt --to vi --out - --model qwen3.5:9b --base-url http://127.0.0.1:11434
